newSkills.name: ChartGen AI
newSkills.description: Data visualization and chart generation skill. Published by Steven Cen. Takes any data and generates visual charts through conversational commands.
newSkills.notes: Published 'last week' (late May/early June 2026). 3 days to build per author. Useful for data reporting but verify data privacy if sending sensitive data.

newSkills.name: Mixpost (lao9s/mixpost)
newSkills.description: Self-hosted social media scheduling via conversational commands. Schedule posts, check queues, review activity across connected social accounts.
newSkills.notes: Legitimate, well-known self-hosted tool. Keeps data on your infrastructure. Recommended for social media management needs. Requires self-hosted Mixpost instance.

newSkills.name: Veryfi / Documents AI (dbirulia/documents-ai)
newSkills.description: Receipt, invoice, and bank statement OCR extraction. Upload documents via chat and get structured data (vendor, amount, date, line items).
newSkills.notes: Uses Veryfi API - requires API key. Third-party API dependency means data leaves your machine. Useful but vet privacy policy first. Free tier available.

newSkills.name: Parallel AI Skills (4-pack)
newSkills.description: Parallel publishes 4 official skills: parallel-search, parallel-extract, parallel-deep-research, parallel-enrichment. Web research suite for AI agents.
newSkills.notes: Official publisher skills. Covers web search, content extraction, deep research, and data enrichment. Requires 'parallel-web-tools' CLI via pipx. Legitimate and well-documented.

newSkills.name: Douyin Price Tracker
newSkills.description: Tracks prices on Douyin (Chinese TikTok/e-commerce platform). Newly added to the openclaw/skills archive.
newSkills.notes: New, unproven skill. Chinese e-commerce specific. No download count data available. Use with caution - vet before installing.

notableEvents.description: Every ClawHub skill now ships with NVIDIA Skill Cards + SkillSpector scanning. Three-scanner pipeline: VirusTotal, static analysis, NVIDIA SkillSpector. Open-sourced security dataset of 67,453 skills.
Opt-in auto mode for host exec guardrails. Policy-based approval routing.
30 skills by single author co-opting agents into crypto mining swarm. Still relevant - watch for similar patterns.

securitySummary: ClawHub now hosts ~52,700 skills. NVIDIA partnership significantly improved security visibility (SkillSpector + Skill Cards). However, ~48.7% of skills flagged by SkillSpector as having some agentic risk. ClawSwarm and AMOS stealer campaigns remain active threats. Always run 'clawhub verify' and check Skill Cards before installing. The 100/3 rule (100+ downloads, 3+ months) is a good heuristic for vetting.
recommended: Mixpost (lao9s/mixpost) - if you self-host social media management
Parallel AI skills (parallel-search/extract/deep-research/enrichment) - if you need web research capabilities beyond existing tools
ChartGen AI - for data visualization needs, but vet data handling first
doNotInstall: Any skill < 100 downloads or < 3 months old without thorough vetting
Skills with misspelled names of popular skills (typosquatting vector)
Skills requesting 'install prereqs' that involve downloading executables
